name: BlockVigil
description: Developer of software development program designed to develop blockchain applications. The company's software offers developer tools to build and scale blockchain applications with just a few lines of code and allows to build full-stack apps on the blockchain without learning protocol specifics, enabling users to build applications without learning specifics protocols.

name: Kura
description: Developer of an augmented reality system designed to build the next-generation augmented reality optics and display modules. The company offers augmented reality glasses that provide a view that works under daylight, have bio-sensor inputs, and use a microdisplay instead of a huge display phone, and artificial intelligence for empowering and connecting people, enabling clients to read emotional feedback and molecule structure in the environment with use cases in global telepresence, training, and visualization.

name: MessageCube
description: Developer of a messaging platform designed to allow people to share their purchase experiences over chat. The company's platform provides built-in chat migration for group chat, unlimited picture video sharing, smart search functionality over various categories, location sending and sharing, and background customization, enabling people to share fun activities with their friends over chat.

name: Ovation
description: Developer of an actionable guest feedback platform designed to drive revenue for multi-unit restaurants. The company's platform tracks and figures out the enterprise's loyal customers and assists them in leaving positive online reviews, as well as provides customer feedback and increases social media following, enabling businesses to monitor and measure their web presence and engage increased customers by improving their online marketing strategies.

name: Pilleve
description: Developer of a remote monitoring system designed to reduce the risk of addiction to controlled drugs. The company's bottle aims to prevent the long-term costs associated with opioid abuse and addiction, enabling patients to receive optimal care while preventing the risk of addiction.

name: Got-its
description: Developer of Bluetooth labels designed to keep track of shared things at work as tools. The company's labels automatically track anything, keep an audit trail of things moving, and integrate into ERP systems, enabling companies to keep track of inventory, assets, and orders.

name: Savion Aerospace
description: Developer of natural gas-powered aircraft designed to transform the aviation industry. The company's aircraft facilitates the rapid adoption of natural gas vehicles and sources carbon-negative renewable LNG for its customers at low cost as it does not increase the cost of frequently replacing batteries or a heavier aircraft to carry them, enabling clients to avail a carbon-negative air transport system that is economically competitive.

name: SnapShyft
description: Operator of staffing-as-a-service software designed to connect companies with vetted and qualified professionals. The company's platform allows firms to get the right talent for their immediate needs while eliminating bias and discrimination in the process, enabling businesses to drop the need for temporary staffing agencies.

name: Svastia
description: Developer of a clinical-genomic platform intended to improve people's lives through precision medicines. The company's platform provides multi-omic analytics workflows and access to novel clinical genomic data to accelerate biomarker discovery and validation, enabling doctors to select the right therapy for patients or refer them to the right clinical trials using their genetic profiles.

name: HAMAMA
description: Provider of microgreen kits intended to grow food at home. The company's kits offer plants like wheatgrass, cat grass, seed quilts and other related plants, enabling customers to live a healthy life by growing superfoods at home.

name: Alba
description: Alba connects families with caregivers in Latin America and provides peace of mind in every step of the caring process. Through its platforms, Alba connects families with caregivers of their social networks, allowing parents to book caregivers just as if their best friend would have recommended it. After booking, parents receive live updates of what’s happening at home and caregivers receive 24/7 support, ensuring peace of mind in every step of the process
